member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbAuthKind.Token
member.summary: The device is sending a token for the host to sign.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbAuthKind.Signature
member.summary: The host is sending a signature for the token.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbAuthKind.PublicKey
member.summary: The host is sending its public key.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand.Sync
member.summary: Synchronization command used by older protocol revisions.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand.Okay
member.summary: Acknowledges a stream or write operation.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand.Auth
member.summary: Carries an authentication token, signature, or public key.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand.StartTls
member.summary: Starts stream-based TLS when both peers support it.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbConstants.HeaderLength
member.summary: Size of an ADB packet header in bytes.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbConstants.VersionSkipChecksum
member.summary: Protocol version where peers may omit payload checksums by sending zero.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacket
member.summary: Complete ADB packet with header and payload.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacket.#ctor(AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketHeader,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacket.Create(AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte})
member.summary: Creates a packet with a generated header.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacket.Create(AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a packet with a generated header.
member.param: True to encode a zero payload checksum for peers that negotiated checksum skipping.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacket.FromWire(AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketHeader,System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a packet from wire data while applying the negotiated checksum mode.
member.param: True when the peer negotiated checksum skipping.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketCodec.ComputeMagic(AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand)
member.summary: Computes the ADB command magic value.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketCodec.Write(AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacket,System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes a packet to a caller-provided buffer.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketCodec.Read(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Reads a complete packet from a contiguous buffer.
member.param: True when the peer negotiated checksum skipping.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketCodec.WriteUInt32LittleEndian(System.Span{System.Byte},System.UInt32)
member.summary: Writes a 32-bit little-endian integer for service-level protocols.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketHeader.Create(AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Creates a validated header for a command and payload.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketHeader.Create(AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbCommand,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a validated header for a command and payload.
member.param: True to encode a zero payload checksum for peers that negotiated checksum skipping.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketHeader.Write(System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Writes the header using ADB little-endian wire format.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbPacketHeader.Read(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Byte})
member.summary: Reads and validates the fixed header fields.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbServiceEncoding
member.summary: Encodes ADB service strings and host request prefixes.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbServiceEncoding.EncodeOpenPayload(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes a stream service string as a null-terminated UTF-8 payload.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Adb.AdbServiceEncoding.EncodeLengthPrefixedRequest(System.String)
member.summary: Encodes an ADB server-style request using a four-hex-digit length prefix.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootProtocol.MaxCommandLength
member.summary: Maximum command packet length in bytes.

member.name: F:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootProtocol.MaxResponseLength
member.summary: Maximum response packet length in bytes.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootProtocol.GetEncodedCommandLength(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the encoded byte length of a Fastboot command.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootProtocol.EncodeCommand(System.String,System.Span{System.Byte})
member.summary: Encodes a Fastboot command into a caller-provided buffer.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootProtocol.FormatDownloadCommand(System.Int64)
member.summary: Formats the Fastboot download command for a byte length.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootResponse
member.param: The payload after the four-byte response tag.
The requested data phase length for responses.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootResponse.#ctor(AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootResponseKind,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int64})
member.param: The payload after the four-byte response tag.
The requested data phase length for responses.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootResponse.Payload
member.summary: The payload after the four-byte response tag.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Protocol.Fastboot.FastbootResponse.DataLength
member.summary: The requested data phase length for responses.
